description_long: This object depicts a highly stylized adult human figure in a dynamic, crouched pose with arms extended widely to the sides. The figure's limbs and torso are elongated and distorted, giving it an abstract, almost surreal appearance. The head is bald and proportionally small compared to the exaggerated length of the arms and legs. The figure appears to be wearing tight-fitting pants, while the upper body is unclothed, revealing a simplified anatomical structure. The surface texture is smooth and matte, with visible segmentation and stretching in the geometry. The overall form suggests motion or athleticism, but the extreme proportions and deformations make it appear more like a sculptural or artistic representation than a realistic human.
description: A distorted, stylized adult human figure in a crouched, dynamic pose with exaggeratedly long arms and legs, smooth surface, and abstract proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide arm span, crouched legs, and forward-facing head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme elongation of the arms and the bent posture of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the back, extended arms, and the curvature of the torso.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the head's tilt and the abstract, angular limb positions.
